title: Only one with 99_Preserved_Source_Archives/ + CURRENT_TRUTH_AT_A_GLANCE.md
public_claim: Only one with 99_Preserved_Source_Archives/ + CURRENT_TRUTH_AT_A_GLANCE.md is a source packet for this is the canonical "proper handoff archive" — the fullest forensic-preservation packaging in the 04-11 series.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Only one with 99_Preserved_Source_Archives/ + CURRENT_TRUTH_AT_A_GLANCE.md, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
